import ast
files = [
    'fastapi_backend/routers/autotest_diff.py',
    'fastapi_backend/routers/auth.py',
    'fastapi_backend/routers/admin_exams.py',
    'fastapi_backend/routers/admin_community.py',
    'fastapi_backend/routers/admin_system.py',
    'fastapi_backend/routers/admin_users.py',
    'fastapi_backend/routers/community.py',
    'fastapi_backend/routers/autotest_health.py',
    'fastapi_backend/routers/autotest_groups.py',
    'fastapi_backend/routers/autotest_environments.py',
    'fastapi_backend/routers/autotest_global_variables.py',
    'fastapi_backend/routers/autotest_execution.py',
    'fastapi_backend/routers/search.py',
    'fastapi_backend/models/models.py',
    'fastapi_backend/models/autotest.py',
    'fastapi_backend/services/autotest_scenario_runner.py',
    'fastapi_backend/services/autotest_scheduler.py',
    'fastapi_backend/services/autotest_execution.py',
    'fastapi_backend/services/autotest_request_service.py',
    'fastapi_backend/schemas/autotest.py',
    'fastapi_backend/main.py',
]
errors = []
for f in files:
    try:
        with open\(f, 'r', encoding='utf-8'\) as fh:
            ast.parse\(fh.read\(\)\)
    except SyntaxError as e:
        errors.append\(f'{f}: {e}'\)
    except Exception as e:
        errors.append\(f'{f}: {e}'\)
if errors:
    for e in errors:
        print\(f'ERROR: {e}'\)
else:
    print\(f'All {len\(files\)} files passed syntax check'\)
" 2>&1)

import sys, io
sys.stdout = io.TextIOWrapper\(sys.stdout.buffer, encoding='utf-8', errors='replace'\)

SERVER = '34.150.26.84'
USER = 'root'
PASS = 'PENGZEYA19940821'

client = paramiko.SSHClient\(\)
client.set_missing_host_key_policy\(paramiko.AutoAddPolicy\(\)\)
client.connect\(SERVER, port=22, username=USER, password=PASS, timeout=15\)

cmds = [
    'cd /root/TestMasterProject && git fetch --all && git reset --hard origin/main',
    'cd /root/TestMasterProject && docker compose build --no-cache backend 2>&1',
    'cd /root/TestMasterProject && docker compose up -d 2>&1',
]

for cmd in cmds:
    print\(f'>>> {cmd}'\)
    stdin, stdout, stderr = client.exec_command\(cmd, timeout=600\)
    out = stdout.read\(\).decode\('utf-8', errors='replace'\)
    err = stderr.read\(\).decode\('utf-8', errors='replace'\)
    if out: print\(out[-2000:] if len\(out\) > 2000 else out\)
    if err: print\(err[-2000:] if len\(err\) > 2000 else err\)
    rc = stdout.channel.recv_exit_status\(\)
    print\(f'exit: {rc}'\)
    if rc != 0:
        print\('FAILED, aborting'\)
        break
    print\(\)

client.close\(\)
print\('=== Done ==='\)
" 2>&1)

import paramiko
import os

ssh = paramiko.SSHClient\(\)
ssh.set_missing_host_key_policy\(paramiko.AutoAddPolicy\(\)\)
ssh.connect\('34.150.26.84', username='root', password='PENGZEYA19940821'\)

# Pull latest code on server
stdin, stdout, stderr = ssh.exec_command\('cd /root/TestMasterProject && git pull origin main 2>&1'\)
print\("Git pull:", stdout.read\(\).decode\(\)\)
print\("Errors:", stderr.read\(\).decode\(\)\)

# Copy dist files
sftp = ssh.open_sftp\(\)
local_dist = 'C:/Users/lenovo/Desktop/TestMasterProject/frontend/dist'
remote_dist = '/root/TestMasterProject/frontend/dist'

def upload_dir\(local_path, remote_path\):
    try:
        sftp.mkdir\(remote_path\)
    except:
        pass
    for item in os.listdir\(local_path\):
        local_item = os.path.join\(local_path, item\)
        remote_item = f"{remote_path}/{item}"
        if os.path.isdir\(local_item\):
            upload_dir\(local_item, remote_item\)
        else:
            sftp.put\(local_item, remote_item\)
            print\(f"  uploaded: {remote_item}"\)

upload_dir\(local_dist, remote_dist\)

# Reload nginx
stdin, stdout, stderr = ssh.exec_command\('docker exec testmaster-nginx nginx -s reload 2>&1'\)
print\("Nginx reload:", stdout.read\(\).decode\(\), stderr.read\(\).decode\(\)\)

sftp.close\(\)
ssh.close\(\)
print\("Deploy done!"\)
PYEOF)

import paramiko

ssh = paramiko.SSHClient\(\)
ssh.set_missing_host_key_policy\(paramiko.AutoAddPolicy\(\)\)
ssh.connect\('34.150.26.84', username='root', password='PENGZEYA19940821'\)

# Re-upload the LATEST dist \(second build with removeConsole\)
sftp = ssh.open_sftp\(\)
import os

local_dist = 'C:/Users/lenovo/Desktop/TestMasterProject/frontend/dist'
remote_dist = '/root/TestMasterProject/frontend/dist'

# Clean old assets first
stdin, stdout, stderr = ssh.exec_command\(f'rm -rf {remote_dist}/assets && mkdir -p {remote_dist}/assets'\)
stdout.read\(\)
print\("Cleaned remote assets"\)

def upload_dir\(local_path, remote_path\):
    try:
        sftp.mkdir\(remote_path\)
    except:
        pass
    for item in os.listdir\(local_path\):
        local_item = os.path.join\(local_path, item\)
        remote_item = f"{remote_path}/{item}"
        if os.path.isdir\(local_item\):
            upload_dir\(local_item, remote_item\)
        else:
            sftp.put\(local_item, remote_item\)

upload_dir\(local_dist, remote_dist\)
print\("Uploaded latest dist"\)

# Verify
stdin, stdout, stderr = ssh.exec_command\(f'head -15 {remote_dist}/index.html'\)
print\("=== Server index.html ==="\)
print\(stdout.read\(\).decode\(\)\)

stdin, stdout, stderr = ssh.exec_command\(f'ls {remote_dist}/assets/ | grep -i help'\)
print\("=== Help files ==="\)
print\(stdout.read\(\).decode\(\)\)

# Reload nginx
stdin, stdout, stderr = ssh.exec_command\('docker exec testmaster-nginx nginx -s reload 2>&1'\)
print\("Nginx:", stdout.read\(\).decode\(\), stderr.read\(\).decode\(\)\)

sftp.close\(\)
ssh.close\(\)
print\("Done!"\)
PYEOF)

import paramiko

ssh = paramiko.SSHClient\(\)
ssh.set_missing_host_key_policy\(paramiko.AutoAddPolicy\(\)\)
ssh.connect\('34.150.26.84', username='root', password='PENGZEYA19940821'\)

# Check if new AutoTest JS contains Mock/Suite/AI/Coverage tabs
stdin, stdout, stderr = ssh.exec_command\('docker exec testmaster-nginx grep -o "MockService\\\\|SuiteManager\\\\|mock-tab\\\\|suite-tab\\\\|ai-tab\\\\|coverage-tab\\\\|HelpDrawer\\\\|showHelp\\\\|使用说明" /usr/share/nginx/html/assets/AutoTest-C6crz2iy.js | sort -u'\)
print\("=== AutoTest JS features ==="\)
print\(stdout.read\(\).decode\(\)\)

# Check ScenarioList for HelpDrawer
stdin, stdout, stderr = ssh.exec_command\('docker exec testmaster-nginx grep -o "HelpDrawer\\\\|showHelp\\\\|使用说明" /usr/share/nginx/html/assets/index-YgKWZn69.js | sort -u'\)
print\("=== Main JS help features ==="\)
print\(stdout.read\(\).decode\(\)\)

# Check help-content JS chunk
stdin, stdout, stderr = ssh.exec_command\('docker exec testmaster-nginx ls /usr/share/nginx/html/assets/ | grep help'\)
print\("=== help-content chunk ==="\)
print\(stdout.read\(\).decode\(\)\)

# Also check via HTTPS request to see headers

import paramiko, os

ssh = paramiko.SSHClient\(\)
ssh.set_missing_host_key_policy\(paramiko.AutoAddPolicy\(\)\)
ssh.connect\('34.150.26.84', username='root', password='PENGZEYA19940821'\)

# Wipe remote dist completely
stdin, stdout, stderr = ssh.exec_command\('rm -rf /root/TestMasterProject/frontend/dist'\)
stdout.read\(\)

# Upload fresh dist
sftp = ssh.open_sftp\(\)
local_dist = 'C:/Users/lenovo/Desktop/TestMasterProject/frontend/dist'
remote_dist = '/root/TestMasterProject/frontend/dist'

def upload_dir\(local_path, remote_path\):
    try:
        sftp.mkdir\(remote_path\)
    except:
        pass
    for item in os.listdir\(local_path\):
        local_item = os.path.join\(local_path, item\)
        remote_item = f"{remote_path}/{item}"
        if os.path.isdir\(local_item\):
            upload_dir\(local_item, remote_item\)
        else:
            sftp.put\(local_item, remote_item\)

upload_dir\(local_dist, remote_dist\)

# Verify
stdin, stdout, stderr = ssh.exec_command\('ls /root/TestMasterProject/frontend/dist/assets/ | grep -E "^\(CodeEditor|AutoTest|index-YgK\)"'\)
print\("=== Server assets ==="\)
print\(stdout.read\(\).decode\(\)\)

# Check main JS references match
stdin, stdout, stderr = ssh.exec_command\('grep -o "CodeEditor-[A-Za-z0-9_-]*\\\\.js" /root/TestMasterProject/frontend/dist/assets/index-YgKWZn69.js | head -1'\)
print\("Main JS refs CodeEditor:", stdout.read\(\).decode\(\)\)

stdin, stdout, stderr = ssh.exec_command\('grep -o "AutoTest-[A-Za-z0-9_-]*\\\\.js" /root/TestMasterProject/frontend/dist/assets/index-YgKWZn69.js | head -1'\)
print\("Main JS refs AutoTest:", stdout.read\(\).decode\(\)\)

# Verify referenced files exist
stdin, stdout, stderr = ssh.exec_command\('ls /root/TestMasterProject/frontend/dist/assets/CodeEditor-DmkgX9O3.js /root/TestMasterProject/frontend/dist/assets/AutoTest-C6crz2iy.js 2>&1'\)
print\("Referenced files exist:", stdout.read\(\).decode\(\)\)

# Reload nginx
stdin, stdout, stderr = ssh.exec_command\('docker exec testmaster-nginx nginx -s reload 2>&1'\)
print\("Nginx:", stdout.read\(\).decode\(\), stderr.read\(\).decode\(\)\)

sftp.close\(\)
ssh.close\(\)
print\("Deploy done!"\)
PYEOF)

Bash("/c/Users/lenovo/AppData/Local/Programs/Python/Python310/python.exe" -c "
import paramiko, time

HOST = '34.150.26.84'
USER = 'root'
PASSWORD = 'PENGZEYA19940821'

client = paramiko.SSHClient\(\)
client.set_missing_host_key_policy\(paramiko.AutoAddPolicy\(\)\)
client.connect\(HOST, username=USER, password=PASSWORD, timeout=15\)

def run\(cmd, timeout=180\):
    print\(f'>>> {cmd}'\)
    stdin, stdout, stderr = client.exec_command\(cmd, timeout=timeout\)
    out = stdout.read\(\).decode\('utf-8', errors='replace'\)
    err = stderr.read\(\).decode\('utf-8', errors='replace'\)
    if out.strip\(\): print\(out.strip\(\)\)
    if err.strip\(\): print\('STDERR:', err.strip\(\)\)
    return out + err

try:
    print\('====== [1/4] Pulling latest code ======'\)
    run\('cd /root/TestMasterProject && git pull origin main'\)

    print\(\)
    print\('====== [2/4] Building frontend ======'\)
    run\('cd /root/TestMasterProject/frontend && npm run build', timeout=180\)

    print\(\)
    print\('====== [3/4] Rebuilding and restarting containers ======'\)
    run\('cd /root/TestMasterProject && docker compose up -d --build', timeout=300\)

    print\(\)
    print\('====== [4/4] Waiting and checking status ======'\)
    time.sleep\(15\)
    run\('docker compose -f /root/TestMasterProject/docker-compose.yml ps'\)
    run\('curl -sf http://localhost:5001/api/health && echo OK || echo FAILED'\)

    print\(\)
    print\('====== Deployment complete ======'\)
finally:
    client.close\(\)
" 2>&1)
